text.message: Going to need it lol. Im locked into 3 numbers
Black with a very nice grab at end
really crazy to see double double 8s
Yeah but black blocking it slowed us down big tome
i appreciate your moves of deception
Especially when you make a deal like that
I mean u are not trading
I just really didnt need it
yeah i didnt get that move either lol
Yeah but I’m not going to seven out
Yup and that’s my whole game lol
I have 8 brick and 8 wood and havent been able to build one road
at this point even i am rooting for an 8 lol
My roads are from trading 4:1 lol
Im just getting furious lol. Like its very upsetting
Bad game for us both to have two 8s
did one of you guys do a pact with the devil or something?
More like u saw god today
Once he gets road he probably wins
its really crazy to see double double 8s go like this
